name: Cyberark Memberships With Inactive Users
description: Detects Cyberark group memberships that still reference inactive users.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id FROM cyberark_group_memberships m JOIN cyberark_users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE NOT (COALESCE(u.active, true) = true)
remediation: Remove inactive users from all groups and verify deprovisioning workflows are complete.
